The '''''Integrity''''' was a [[Venator-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Venator''-class Star Destroyer]] that had been assigned to the [[Open Circle Fleet/Legends|Open Circle Fleet]] as part of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Navy/Legends|Navy]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Description==
The ''Integrity'' was a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Navy/Legends|Navy]] [[Venator-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Venator''-class Star Destroyer]] that was [[Color/Legends|colored]] light gray with red and yellow [[Open Circle Fleet/Legends|Open Circle Fleet]] emblems painted on either side of dorsal bay doors that were painted a darker gray. While most ''Venator''-class [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] were marked symmetrically, the ''Integrity''{{'s}} port wing was uniquely painted with a larger maroon delta shape than the one painted on the starboard wing.

==History==
During the final days of the war, it served as [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of [[Jedi General/Legends|Generals]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], leading the Republic charge at the [[Battle of Belderone]] and the [[recapture of Tythe]].

The warship and the rest of the Open Circle Fleet came to the aid of [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] in the [[Battle of Coruscant/Legends|Battle of Coruscant]].

==Behind the scenes==
On [[June]] [[June 19|19]], [[2007]], the ''Integrity'' was first represented as a miniature in the [[Star_Wars_PocketModel_TCG#Base_Set|''premier release'']] of [[WizKids Games|WizKids's]] ''[[Star Wars PocketModel TCG]]''. Having only appeared in non-visual media, the miniature game piece and associated promotional images are the only visual representations of the Star Destroyer so far.<ref name="Integrity">{{SWPM|set=Base Set|cardname=''Integrity Venator''-class star destroyer|link=http://www.swpocketmodels.com/images/ship34.jpg}}</ref>

{{Ship-stub}}
